org.apache.paimon.flink.query

Class RemoteTableQuery

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.flink.query.RemoteTableQuery
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Closeable, AutoCloseable, TableQuery

    public class RemoteTableQuery
extends Object
implements TableQuery
    Implementation for TableQuery to lookup data from remote service.
